title: God's Pardon.
content:
When I shall sin, pardon my trespass here;
    For once in hell, none knows remission there.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "God's Pardon.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
